# Generated Dart FFI Bindings

This directory contains auto-generated Dart FFI bindings for the KeyRx Core library.

## DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY

All files in this directory are automatically generated by the binding generator script.
Any manual changes will be overwritten the next time the script runs.

## Regenerating Bindings

To regenerate the bindings after making changes to Rust FFI exports:

```bash
# From project root
python3 scripts/generate_dart_bindings.py

# Format the generated code
cd ui
dart format lib/ffi/generated/
```

## How It Works

The generator script:
1. Scans `core/src/ffi/` for `#[no_mangle] pub extern "C"` functions
2. Parses function signatures and doc comments
3. Generates Dart FFI type definitions (native and Dart versions)
4. Creates a `KeyrxBindingsGenerated` class with lazy-loaded function lookups
5. Converts Rust naming (`keyrx_function_name`) to Dart naming (`functionName`)

## Generated Files

- `bindings_generated.dart` - Main bindings file with all FFI function declarations

## Type Mappings

The generator maps Rust FFI types to Dart types:

| Rust Type | Dart Native Type | Dart Type |
|-----------|------------------|-----------|
| `*const c_char` | `Pointer<Char>` | `Pointer<Char>` |
| `bool` | `Bool` | `bool` |
| `u8, u16, u32, u64` | `Uint8, Uint16, Uint32, Uint64` | `int` |
| `i8, i16, i32, i64` | `Int8, Int16, Int32, Int64` | `int` |
| `f32, f64` | `Float, Double` | `double` |
| `()` | `Void` | `void` |

## Testing

Tests for the generated bindings are in `test/ffi/bindings_generated_test.dart`.

Run tests with:
```bash
flutter test test/ffi/bindings_generated_test.dart
```
